lead_list.notes: The '340 contacts' dataset and A$25k–A$500k ACV figure are asserted without verifiable source; list is largely a placeholder upsell.

action_plan.notes: AUSTRAC 29 July 2026 deadline and $26M Westpac penalty are specific but unverified; R&D rate and super figures repeated from other sections.

swot_analysis.notes: NAB-Banked acquisition link is unverified; '76% of firms testing AI' stat unsourced; ACV range, R&D rate and super figures duplicated across sections.

first_customers.notes: Westpac $26M penalty and 200-banker hiring signal are plausible but uncited; CommBank tech stack details are vague and hedged weakly.

events_resources.notes: Internal '/events/' links are fabricated placeholders; Fenergo/FINEOS case study URLs are invented, undermining grounding despite good Irish-corridor personalisation.

setup_compliance.notes: Director ID 4–6 week timeline and treaty withholding rates are specific and plausible; EMDG A$770k figure and R&D rate repeated from executive summary.

executive_summary.notes: US$11.51B market size and 13.4% CAGR cited as [1] with no traceable source; competitor analysis names Alloy but provides no AU-specific grounding.

service_providers.notes: NEXTGEN, Stone & Chalk, Gadens are real and relevant; Hatch Quarter and TechVisa less verifiable; many providers duplicated verbatim from action_plan.

competitor_landscape.notes: Engine (Pakistani apparel brand) included as a competitor with no fintech relevance; only three competitors listed, one entirely irrelevant, severely weakening the section.

mentor_recommendations.notes: LinkedIn URLs for Navaid Khatib point to his profile yet describe AusPayNet board role without verification; Brian Cooke identity is ambiguous and unverified.

investor_recommendations.notes: Folklore and Partners for Growth are real and plausible fits; angel check sizes for Muir and Basha are unspecified, reducing decision-readiness.

lead_list.notes: Admits no matching data found; '47 firms' statistic uncited and unverified; generic redirect to custom list weakens decision-readiness.

action_plan.notes: R&D registration incorrectly directed to ARC instead of AusIndustry/business.gov.au; salary and burn figures repeated verbatim from SWOT.

swot_analysis.notes: LaunchVic AUD 50,000 dollar-matched claim unverified; salary and burn figures duplicated across multiple sections.

first_customers.notes: HubSpot and WordPress tech-stack claims presented as fact without sourcing; Walter Page entry is incomplete placeholder reducing utility.

events_resources.notes: Internal content links unverifiable; GitHub case study referenced in summary but not listed in section body, creating inconsistency.

setup_compliance.notes: R&D registration again misattributed to ARC rather than AusIndustry; superannuation rate (11.5%) conflicts with action_plan's stated 12%.

executive_summary.notes: R&D registration incorrectly cites ARC; 'Future Fund Victoria' is not a recognised program name; key figures heavily repeated from body sections.

service_providers.notes: Treadstone and Granton URLs need verification; Stone & Chalk and Hatch Quarter repeated from action_plan without new decision-ready detail.

competitor_landscape.notes: Robert Half partnership claim for SourceWhale stated confidently without citation; otherwise well-differentiated and minimally repetitive.

mentor_recommendations.notes: LinkedIn profiles for Sinead Connolly and Madeline Ferguson presented as verified mentors without confirmed advisory relationship to Floats.

investor_recommendations.notes: Smart50 Awards framed as grant funding source which is inaccurate; Potentia and SecondQuarter premature for seed stage, reducing relevance.

lead_list.notes: Named datasets with URLs appear to be internal product links, not independently verifiable; no evidence these lists exist.

action_plan.notes: Stone & Chalk, FinTech Australia, NEXTGEN, Intersekt repeated across multiple sections; NEXTGEN as distribution partner is unverified.

swot_analysis.notes: USD 40M AI market figure and 72% AI adoption stat cited without traceable primary source; repeated across exec summary.

first_customers.notes: CBA $90M AI program and ANZ reverse pitch signals plausible but unverified; ANZ section notably thinner with no tech signals.

events_resources.notes: Internal relative URLs for events and content are not independently verifiable; Fenergo and Brighte case studies are generic.

setup_compliance.notes: A-UKFTA residency director claim is hedged but slightly overstated; otherwise well-grounded and Infact-corridor specific.

executive_summary.notes: Heavily recaps figures and recommendations from SWOT, action plan and setup sections; significant repetition across the report.

service_providers.notes: Adrenalin Equity in competitor section and ADAPT here are weakly grounded; Stone & Chalk and FinTech Australia repeated from multiple sections.

mentor_recommendations.notes: Named mentors have LinkedIn URLs but roles and relevance are asserted without sourcing; Jason Marsham profile link looks low-confidence.

investor_recommendations.notes: Angel investor check sizes and backgrounds largely unverified; Beachhead VC range and Vincent Turner Frollo link are unsourced.

lead_list.notes: ANZ Trade database of '210 contacts' is unverifiable; section is largely a placeholder upsell with no actionable named leads.

action_plan.notes: Purpose Ventures URL inconsistent across report; 'NETA' and 'CERI' plausibility unverified; R&D figures repeated from other sections.

events_resources.notes: West Tech Fest date and 'Black Nova' attendance claim are unverified; internal content links add no grounded value for a real user.

setup_compliance.notes: Solid compliance detail but largely generic Australian startup advice; superannuation rate cited as 11.5% conflicts with 12% stated in events section.

executive_summary.notes: Burda Principal Investments A$16M claim appears fabricated; most key figures (46.1%, 6.4B, 43.5%) repeated from nearly every other section.

investor_recommendations.notes: Electrifi Ventures '450+ members' and prior thermal storage backing are unverified specifics; Blackbird check size range is implausibly wide for seed context.
